title: Origins: Onikuma
description: An Origin based on the Onikuma for the Origins mod. An ancient bear spirit towering at an intimidating height, yet gentle beyond reason.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vSLCXz5iq-s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod. While Pehkui is not mandatory, it is highly recommended.**

[This Origin was suggested by **Desticade** on Discord. If you would like to suggest your own data pack, you can do so over on my Discord server as well.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)

**Onikuma:** An ancient bear spirit towering at an intimidating height, yet gentle beyond reason. A guardian of the wilds with immense strength and a preference for simplicity, their age shows in their slowed movements but not in their might.

Impact: 🟡🟡

**🟩 Ursine Hurl [Primary]:** With unmatched strength, you can grab and throw others with ease.

**🟢 Primal Appetite:** Raw meat restores your hunger far better than any other food.

**🟡 Colossal Bear:** Standing 4.8 blocks tall, your sheer size is a sight to behold.

**🟡 Mighty Paws:** Your powerful claws deal 2 hearts of true damage and knock foes back with incredible force. However, outside your natural habitats like forests and mountains, your strength wanes.

**🔴 Ancient Bones:** The weight of centuries slows your steps and strikes, as age takes its toll.

**🔴 Cumbersome Claws:** Your immense paws make wielding human weapons an impossibility.

[If you have any questions, concerns, or bugs you would like to report, my Discord server is a great place for doing so.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)
